title: Create run_pipeline.py — end-to-end pipeline orchestrator
acceptance_criteria: Imports and calls all 8 component scripts in correct order: load_data → windowing → features → train_classical → evaluate → feature_insights
Runs augmentation branch in parallel/integrated position after windowing
Prints pipeline progress at each stage with timing information
Handles errors gracefully with clear error messages per stage
End-to-end run completes without unhandled exceptions
